observations.note: All 3 commands correctly enforce lean orchestration: no Task(), Bash(), or FOR loops in command bodies.
Pattern consistency is high across all 3 commands: Phase 0 validation, Phase 1 skill invoke, Phase 2 display results.
qa.md removed allowed-tools Write/Edit/Bash/Grep from frontmatter but command still references Glob - this is fine since Glob remains.

ideate.md frontmatter allowed-tools changed from 'Read Write Edit Glob Task AskUserQuestion' to 'Read Glob AskUserQuestion Skill' - space-separated not comma-separated, inconsistent with qa.md which uses commas.
New reference files (phase-0, phase-3, phase-4, phase-marker-protocol) fully preserve all governance content extracted from SKILL.md.
SKILL.md Phase 4 Step 4.5 marker cleanup logic duplicated verbatim in both SKILL.md body and phase-4-cleanup-workflow.md - creates maintenance risk if one diverges.
SKILL.md now correctly defers to reference files for all detailed steps while retaining phase structure and completion checklists - good separation of concerns.
